stamp.title: Switzerland 1854 Strubel 5r Brown
stamp.summary: Switzerland 1854 Strubel issue, seated Helvetia with spear and shield. Imperforate, 5r brown. Dealer note '13' and price '€2,50'. Lightly used.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1854 Strubel 15r Rose
stamp.summary: Switzerland 1854 Strubel issue, imperforate, 15r rose. Heavily used with a black barred/grid cancel. Dealer note '15' and price '€5,-'.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1862 Seated Helvetia 2c Grey
stamp.summary: Switzerland 1862 perforated Seated Helvetia, 2c grey. Dealer note '20' and price '€0,30'. Used with partial circular datestamp.

stamp.summary: Switzerland 1862 perforated Seated Helvetia, 3c black. Dealer note '21.' and price '€10,-'. Used with circular datestamp (appears to be Genève).

stamp.title: Switzerland 1862 Seated Helvetia 40c Green
stamp.summary: Switzerland 1862 perforated Seated Helvetia, 40c green. Dealer note '26.' and price '€4,-'. Used with partial circular datestamp.
